configurations.name: Windows · Debug launch target (MSVC)
configurations.//: Resolves whatever target you pick as the CMake Tools launch target (status bar). cwd is the target's own dir so assets/ — copied next to the exe by the build — resolve via SDL_GetBasePath.

configurations.name: Unix · Debug launch target (lldb/gdb)
configurations.//: macOS uses lldb; on Linux change MIMode to gdb.
